title: Unable to return, displaced southern Lebanese turn to satellite images to check on homes

snapshot.title: Unable to return, displaced southern Lebanese turn to satellite images to check on homes
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Displaced residents of villages in southern Lebanon, who currently have no way of reaching their homes, are turning to commercial satellite imagery to learn whether the houses they fled are still standing. For many families, the images offer the first glimpse of homes left behind during successive waves of displacement since Israel’s war on Lebanon began. Some pool
snapshot.author: NAJIA HOUSSARI
snapshot.pageTitle: Unable to return, displaced southern Lebanese turn to satellite images to check on homes | Arab News
